name: Impact of Omega-3 Fatty Acid Oral Therapy on Healing of Chronic Venous Leg Ulcers in Older Adults
short_name: Omega-3 chronic venous leg ulcer older-adult registry
summary: A ClinicalTrials.gov registry for a completed randomized older-adult chronic venous leg ulcer EPA+DHA trial; the trial completed on December 18, 2024, but has no posted results in the current June 2, 2026 API view.
